languages.text: {n}Иждриг издает зубовный скрежет, от которого по коже пробегают мурашки. Он не сводит тяжелого взгляда с вашего лица, но обращается к Дунавски.{/n} "Капитан-интендант Ведка Дунавски, обсудим это после Тренировочного боя, с глазу на глаз".

{n}Izdrig grinds his teeth with a sound that sends shivers down your spine. He keeps his heavy gaze fixed on your face, yet he addresses Dunawski.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Vedka Dunawski, we will speak of this after the Trial Match, in private."
languages.original_text: {n}Иждриг издает зубовный скрежет, от которого по коже пробегают мурашки. Он не сводит тяжелого взгляда с вашего лица, но обращается к Дунавски.{/n} "Капитан-интендант Ведка Дунавски, обсудим это после Тренировочного боя, с глазу на глаз".

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig grinds his teeth with a sound that sends shivers down your spine. He keeps his heavy gaze fixed on your face, yet he addresses Dunawski.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Vedka Dunawski, we will speak of this after the Trial Match, in private."

{n}Izdrig grinds his teeth with a sound that sends shivers down your spine. He keeps his heavy gaze fixed on your face, yet he addresses Dunawski.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Vedka Dunawski, we will speak of this after the Trial Match, in private."

{n}Izdrig grinds his teeth with a sound that sends shivers down your spine. He keeps his heavy gaze fixed on your face, yet he addresses Dunawski.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Vedka Dunawski, we will speak of this after the Trial Match, in private."

{n}Izdrig grinds his teeth with a sound that sends shivers down your spine. He keeps his heavy gaze fixed on your face, yet he addresses Dunawski.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Vedka Dunawski, we will speak of this after the Trial Match, in private."

languages.text: {n}伊兹德里格咬紧牙关，发出令你不寒而栗的摩擦声。他沉重的目光始终牢牢锁在你脸上，话却是对杜纳芙斯卡说的。{/n}“军需官上尉薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡，此事，待试炼比武结束后，我们私下再谈。”
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig grinds his teeth with a sound that sends shivers down your spine. He keeps his heavy gaze fixed on your face, yet he addresses Dunawski.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Vedka Dunawski, we will speak of this after the Trial Match, in private."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊兹德里格咬紧牙关，发出令你不寒而栗的摩擦声。他沉重的目光始终牢牢锁在你脸上，话却是对杜纳芙斯卡说的。{/n}“军需官上尉薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡，此事，待试炼比武结束后，我们私下再谈。”

languages.text: {n}İzdrig, insanın tüylerini ürperten bir sesle dişlerini gıcırdatıyor. Ağır bakışlarını senden ayırmazken Dunawski'ye hitap ediyor.{/n} "Levazımcı Yüzbaşı Vedka Dunawski, bunu Sınav Karşılaşması'ndan sonra özel olarak konuşacağız."
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig grinds his teeth with a sound that sends shivers down your spine. He keeps his heavy gaze fixed on your face, yet he addresses Dunawski.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Vedka Dunawski, we will speak of this after the Trial Match, in private."

traits.locale_text: {n}İzdrig, insanın tüylerini ürperten bir sesle dişlerini gıcırdatıyor. Ağır bakışlarını senden ayırmazken Dunawski'ye hitap ediyor.{/n} "Levazımcı Yüzbaşı Vedka Dunawski, bunu Sınav Karşılaşması'ndan sonra özel olarak konuşacağız."

languages.text: {n}Izdrig serre les dents en produisant un son qui vous fait frissonner, puis s'adresse à Dunawski sans vous quitter des yeux.{/n} « Capitaine-quartier-maître Vedka Dunawski, nous en parlerons après l'Épreuve par les armes, en privé. »
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig grinds his teeth with a sound that sends shivers down your spine. He keeps his heavy gaze fixed on your face, yet he addresses Dunawski.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Vedka Dunawski, we will speak of this after the Trial Match, in private."

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig serre les dents en produisant un son qui vous fait frissonner, puis s'adresse à Dunawski sans vous quitter des yeux.{/n} « Capitaine-quartier-maître Vedka Dunawski, nous en parlerons après l'Épreuve par les armes, en privé. »

languages.text: {n}Izdrig aprieta los dientes con un sonido que te provoca escalofríos. Mantiene la mirada pesada fija en tu rostro, pero se dirige a Dunawski.{/n} «Capitana intendente Vedka Dunawski, hablaremos de esto después de la prueba de combate, en privado».
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig grinds his teeth with a sound that sends shivers down your spine. He keeps his heavy gaze fixed on your face, yet he addresses Dunawski.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Vedka Dunawski, we will speak of this after the Trial Match, in private."

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig aprieta los dientes con un sonido que te provoca escalofríos. Mantiene la mirada pesada fija en tu rostro, pero se dirige a Dunawski.{/n} «Capitana intendente Vedka Dunawski, hablaremos de esto después de la prueba de combate, en privado».

languages.text: {n}Izdrigs Zähneknirschen lässt dir das Blut in den Adern gefrieren. Ohne den Blick von dir abzuwenden, richtet er das Wort an Dunawski.{/n} "Captain-Quartiermeisterin Vedka Dunawski, darüber sprechen wir nach dem Prüfungskampf unter vier Augen."
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig grinds his teeth with a sound that sends shivers down your spine. He keeps his heavy gaze fixed on your face, yet he addresses Dunawski.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Vedka Dunawski, we will speak of this after the Trial Match, in private."

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrigs Zähneknirschen lässt dir das Blut in den Adern gefrieren. Ohne den Blick von dir abzuwenden, richtet er das Wort an Dunawski.{/n} "Captain-Quartiermeisterin Vedka Dunawski, darüber sprechen wir nach dem Prüfungskampf unter vier Augen."

languages.text: {n}イズドリックは歯を食いしばり、背筋がぞくぞくするような音を立てた。彼の重い視線は君に向けられているが、話しかけるのはダナウスキーだ。{/n}「ダナウスキー大尉、この件は試合後に、私室で話そう。」
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig grinds his teeth with a sound that sends shivers down your spine. He keeps his heavy gaze fixed on your face, yet he addresses Dunawski.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Vedka Dunawski, we will speak of this after the Trial Match, in private."

traits.locale_text: {n}イズドリックは歯を食いしばり、背筋がぞくぞくするような音を立てた。彼の重い視線は君に向けられているが、話しかけるのはダナウスキーだ。{/n}「ダナウスキー大尉、この件は試合後に、私室で話そう。」
